raw_response: The Anker Nano 67W charger is an excellent choice for your travel needs. With a quality score of 88/100 and a price just under your budget, it offers great value. Its compact foldable design makes it easy to carry in your pocket or bag. It supports both USB-C and USB-A ports, providing versatile charging options. Despite getting warm during full load, its GaN technology ensures fast charging efficiency. While no cable is included, the charger's portability and performance make it a worthwhile investment for travel.
